response.praise: Ennai naesikkira iyaesuvae umakku nhanri
Ennai pataiththa iyaesuvae umakku nhanri
Ennai vaazha vaikka iyaesuvae umathu jiivanai thanhtharae umakku nhanri
iyaechuvae en paavangkalukkaaka nhiir thandanaiyai iyetrukkontiirae umakku nhanri
Enakku nhanmai cheyya aayaththaamaay irukkira iyaesuvae umakku nhanri
En thukkangkaLai maatra vallavaraakiya iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En vaentuthalkalai kaetkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Nhallavarum, nhanmai cheykiravarumaakiya iyaechuvae umakku nhanri.
Enakku nhanmai cheykira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En paavangkalai mannikkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En kanniirai thutaikkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En manathin vaethanaiyai paarkkiRa iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Enakku mana aaruthal kotukkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Enakku nhimmathiyai tharukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Yaar ennai kaivitdaalum ennai kaividaatha iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Ennai vaazha vaikkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Enakku vituthalai tharukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En nhoaykalai kunamaakkukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En pirachchanaiyai thiirkkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En saabangkalai nhiikkukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Ennai maravaamal kaakkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Azhivukku ennai thappuvikkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Ummai nhampukira ennai kaividaatha iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Nhanmaiyinaal ennai thirupthiyaakkukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri.
Thiya aaviyin pitiyilirunhthu ennai vituvikkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Thiiya aavikalai ennai vittu vilakkukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Nharaka thandanaikku ennai thappuvikkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Sakalaththaiyum cheyya vallavarae umakku nhanri
En kanniirai kaankira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Enakku chamaathaanaththai tharukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
AthichayangkaL cheykira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Ellaam cheyya vallavaraakiya umakku nhanri
Enakku irakkam cheykira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Ennai uyarththa vallavaraakiya iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Thikkarravanukku chakaayam cheykira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Nhaan vaazha vazhikaattukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En thukkangkalai maarrukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Thataikalai ellaam nhiikkippoatukiravarae umakku nhanri
Paavangkalai mannikkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Ennai uyiroatu kaakkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Ennutaiya nherukkaththai maatrukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En alaichchalkalai paarkkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
En irulai velichchamaakkukira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Engkalai paathukaaththu sukamaay irukka cheykira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Azhukaiyin chaththaththai kaetkira iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Iyaechuvae en ellaikalil ulla chaththuruvin kattukal utaikkappatumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae en pirachchanaikal nhiingkumpatiyaay ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae en kuraivukal nhiraivaakumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae en ellaikalil ulla manhthira vallamaikal azhinhthu poakumpati umamai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae en ellaikalil cheyalpatukira asuththa kiriyaikal azhikkappatumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae en thunpannkal nhiingkumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Yaechuvae en kutumpaththil cheyalpatukira ellaa paavaththin kiriyaikal nhiingkumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae engkalai aalukai cheykiRa irulin vallamaikal muzhuvathum azhikkappatumpati umathu vallamai vilangkumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae engkal kutumpam vituvikkappatumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae en ellaikalil ulla atimaiththana nhukaththatikal murikkapada ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae en vaazhvil ulla poaraatdangkal nhiingkumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae engkal ellaikalil nhanmaikal undaakumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Iyaechuvae engkal ellaikalil chamaathaanam undaakumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
Ennakku nanmai seyya ennai thaedi vantha iyaechuvae umakku nhanri
Iyaechuvae nhiir enakku kotukkira nhanmaikalai perakuudaathu ena thatai cheykira chaththuruvin kiriyaikal azhikkappatumpati ummai thuthikkiraen
